name: atlas-cli
description: Atlas CLI - 斑马云图人力基线管理工具

scripts.build:bun: bun build ./adapters/atlas/cli.ts --compile --external keytar --external playwright --external playwright-core --outfile dist-bun/atlas
scripts.build:bun:mac-arm64: npm run sync-version && bun build ./adapters/atlas/cli.ts --compile --target=bun-darwin-arm64 --external keytar --external playwright --external playwright-core --outfile dist-bun/atlas-darwin-arm64
scripts.build:bun:mac-x64: npm run sync-version && bun build ./adapters/atlas/cli.ts --compile --target=bun-darwin-x64 --external keytar --external playwright --external playwright-core --outfile dist-bun/atlas-darwin-x64
scripts.build:bun:linux-x64: npm run sync-version && bun build ./adapters/atlas/cli.ts --compile --target=bun-linux-x64 --external keytar --external playwright --external playwright-core --outfile dist-bun/atlas-linux-x64
scripts.build:bun:linux-arm64: npm run sync-version && bun build ./adapters/atlas/cli.ts --compile --target=bun-linux-arm64 --external keytar --external playwright --external playwright-core --outfile dist-bun/atlas-linux-arm64
scripts.build:bun:win-x64: npm run sync-version && bun build ./adapters/atlas/cli.ts --compile --target=bun-windows-x64 --external keytar --external playwright --external playwright-core --outfile dist-bun/atlas-windows-x64.exe
scripts.build:bun:all: npm run build:bun:mac-arm64 && npm run build:bun:mac-x64 && npm run build:bun:linux-x64 && npm run build:bun:linux-arm64 && npm run build:bun:win-x64
scripts.version: npm run sync-version && git add adapters/atlas/util/version.ts
